Via-Cal by Viantis Lifesciences is a nutraceutical softgel formulation containing calcium citrate, vitamin D3, magnesium, zinc, vitamin K2-7 and cyanocobalamin. It is designed to provide nutritional support for normal bone health, calcium utilization and muscle function.

Why Via-Cal

One thoughtful formula. Multiple layers of support.

Via-Cal brings together complementary nutrients that help support bone health, calcium utilization, muscle function and general wellbeing.

01

Bone strength support

Calcium is an essential mineral for maintaining normal bones and teeth.

02

Calcium absorption

Vitamin D3 supports the normal absorption and utilization of calcium.

03

Muscle function

Magnesium and vitamin D contribute to normal muscle function.

04

Everyday wellness

Zinc and vitamin B12 provide complementary support for immunity, nerves and energy metabolism.

The formula

Six key nutrients, working together.

Each component has a distinct nutritional role. Together, they create a rounded approach to bone and muscle support.

Softgel capsule format

Follow the dosage printed on the pack or the advice of a qualified healthcare professional.

Mineral

Calcium Citrate

A calcium source that supports the maintenance of normal bones and teeth.

Vitamin

Vitamin D3

Supports calcium absorption, calcium utilization and normal muscle function.

Mineral

Magnesium

Supports normal muscle function, nerve function and energy metabolism.

Mineral

Zinc

Contributes to normal immune function and the maintenance of normal bones.

Vitamin

Vitamin K2-7

Provides complementary nutritional support for normal bone health.

Vitamin

Cyanocobalamin (B12)

Supports normal nerve function, red blood cell formation and energy metabolism.

Built for modern wellness

A clean, confident addition to your daily routine.

Via-Cal is positioned as a complete bone and muscle support formula, presented in a convenient softgel capsule format.

Common questions

What to know about Via-Cal.

General product information is provided below. Individual nutritional needs may vary.

What is Via-Cal?

Via-Cal is a nutraceutical softgel formulation containing calcium citrate, vitamin D3, magnesium, zinc, vitamin K2-7 and cyanocobalamin (vitamin B12).

What does the formula support?

Its nutrients provide complementary support for normal bones, calcium utilization, muscle function, nerve health, immunity and energy metabolism.

How should Via-Cal be taken?

Use it only according to the directions printed on the product pack or as advised by a qualified healthcare professional.

Can it replace a balanced diet?

No. Nutraceuticals are intended to supplement, not replace, a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle.

Who should seek medical advice before use?

Pregnant or lactating women, people with medical conditions, and anyone taking medicines should consult a healthcare professional before use.
